summary: Clean config/tooling commit. Removes package-lock.json, adds pnpm-lock.yaml, and sets packageManager to pnpm@10.27.0. The lockfile is consistent with pnpm 10.x (lockfileVersion 9.0), dependencies match package.json, and the pinned version enables corepack enforcement. One minor observation: .gitignore does not guard against accidental package-lock.json re-creation by npm.

suggestions.description: .gitignore does not include package-lock.json to prevent accidental re-creation
suggestions.rationale: If someone runs npm install (without corepack enabled), a package-lock.json will be silently generated and could be committed. Adding it to .gitignore provides defense-in-depth alongside the packageManager field.
